data.title: Ondo Acquires Oasis Pro to Develop Regulated Tokenized Securities Ecosystem
data.description:
TL;DR Ondo Finance announced the acquisition of Oasis Pro, a U. S. -regulated broker, to secure licenses enabling it to operate tokenized assets. The deal includes broker-dealer, ATS, and transfer agent licenses, aiming to launch tokenized stocks in both U. S. and global markets. The firm already manages over $1. 4 billion in assets and joins the growing trend. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/ondo-acquires-oasis-pro-to-develop-regulated-tokenized-securities-ecosystem/

data.title: Bank of Canada explores technical path for retail CBDC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Bank of Canada has taken an important step in exploring the technical feasibility of the digital Canadian dollar, proposing a system designed specifically for retail central bank digital currency (CBDC), focusing on simple daily payments. It is reported that the Bank of Canada team examined the OpenCBDC 2PC model, which was developed in collaboration with the MIT Digital Currency Initiative. Its design prioritizes privacy, speed, and decentralization, allowing users to hold digital funds directly, just like digital cash. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Analysis: Non-farm payrolls report won't change Fed's wait-and-see stance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gold experienced temporary pressure in the previous trading day after non-farm payrolls data showed that the U.S. economy added significantly more jobs than expected and the unemployment rate unexpectedly fell. However, Linh Tran, an analyst at XS.com, said in a report that the report did not indicate an overheated economy, but rather showed a relatively stable growth rate. Tran said this was not enough to force the Federal Reserve to reconsider its wait-and-see stance on monetary policy, which is why gold prices did not fall further. (Jinshi)

data.title: “Insider whales” once again increase their short positions in Bitcoin and Ethereum, with current losses exceeding $14 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnchainLens monitoring, after being partially liquidated 10 times in a row, the "Insider Whale" once again increased his short positions in Bitcoin (40x leverage) and Ethereum (25x leverage). He has lost $16 million in this transaction. Overall, his total loss has exceeded $14 million.

data.title: FTX Recovery Trust may withhold assets from creditors in 49 restricted countries
data.description:
FTX Recovery Trust wants to employ regional lawyers to help determine which countries it can, or can't, return creditor assets to.
source: https://protos.com/ftx-recovery-trust-may-withhold-assets-from-creditors-in-49-restricted-countries/

data.title: Targeted Tariffs Could Strengthen Dollar, UBS Analysts Suggest
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, UBS Global Wealth Management analysts have indicated in a report that the most favorable short-term outcome for the U.S. dollar would be the implementation of targeted tariffs by the United States. As the deadline approaches on July 9 for the re-imposition of higher reciprocal tariffs following a 90-day suspension, analysts suggest that the U.S. may impose tariffs on countries that have not made significant progress in trade agreements, while extending tariff suspensions for those that have shown advancement.

The report highlights that targeting specific countries in trade disputes tends to bolster the dollar, whereas broad tariffs generally weaken it.

data.title: Ondo Finance acquires SEC-registered broker-dealer, eyes tokenized securities
data.description:
Ondo has acquired Oasis Pro, a FINRA member and SEC-registered broker-dealer.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ondo-finance-acquires-oasis-pro-tokenized-securities-us?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: A whale/institution has withdrawn 7.03 million FORM from Binance to an on-chain address in the last half hour
data.description: According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, a whale/institution has withdrawn 7.03 million FORM from Binance to an on-chain address in the last half hour, worth $19.82 million. FORM is the token of the Meme launch platform Four.Meme, renamed from BNX.

data.title: Ancient Bitcoin Wallets Unlock 2 Billion After 14 Years
data.description:
Two mysterious Bitcoin wallets that had been inactive for 14 years transferred 20,000 BTC, worth over $2 billion, shaking up the crypto market.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/bitcoin/ancient-bitcoin-wallets-unlock-2-billion-after-14-years/

data.title: Ethereum and Beyond: EthCC Side Events Focus on Mainstream Adoption, Stablecoins and Beach Swag
data.description:
EthCC has showcased crypto’s breadth in Cannes. Robinhood’s 300-guest château event has added EU access to US stock tokens and new Ethereum and Solana staking, Stellar’s Stable House has examined stablecoin-based DeFi, and Binance has met Cannes’ mayor to promote crypto payments across the Riviera.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ethcc-side-events-mainstream-adoption-stablecoins/

data.title: Russia launches RUBx stablecoin and RT pay digital platform on tron blockchain
data.description:
4-7-2025 – Russia’s state-owned technology conglomerate Rostec announced today the launch of RUBx, a ruble-pegged stablecoin, and RT-Pay, a new digital payment platform, both set to debut later this year. Built on the Tron blockchain, RUBx will be backed 1:1 by the Russian ruble, aiming to facilitate secure and efficient transactions for businesses and individuals, [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/russia-launches-rubx-stablecoin-and-rt-pay-digital-platform-on-tron-blockchain/

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net inflow of 2,617 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net inflow of 36,439 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net inflow of 2,617 BTC (US$283.23 million) today, of which BlackRock had a single-day inflow of 2,044 BTC (US$221.28 million), and the current total holdings reached 698,919 BTC (US$75.65 billion). 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net inflow of 36,439 ETH (US$92.19 million), of which BlackRock had a single-day inflow of 32,987 ETH (US$83.46 million), and the current total holdings reached 1,806,099 ETH (US$4.57 billion).

data.title: Mac House Expands into Bitcoin Mining with Zero Field Partnership
data.description: According to Odaily, Japanese clothing chain Mac House has announced a comprehensive partnership with cryptocurrency mining company Zero Field to enter the Bitcoin mining sector. This move follows their June announcement of a 1.7 billion yen (approximately $12 million) Bitcoin procurement plan. Under the agreement, Mac House will add mining operations to its existing 'buy-and-hold' strategy. The two companies will discuss specific operational plans and may consider expanding into areas such as NFTs in the future.

data.title: Lucky solo Bitcoin miner scores big reward of ‎3.173 BTC worth $350,000
data.description:
A solo Bitcoin miner won the full block reward of ‎3. 173 BTC using a small-scale mining rig with 2. 3 petahash per seconds (PH/s).
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/lucky-solo-bitcoin-miner-3-173-btc/

data.title: Bitrue Joins the Tokenized Stock Trend With New Trading Feature
data.description:
TL;DR Bitrue has introduced tokenized stock trading through its new feature, “Bitrue Alpha”, in partnership with Backed Finance’s xStocks. The platform allows users outside restricted regions to trade blockchain-based tokens representing U. S. equities
source: https://crypto-economy.com/bitrue-joins-the-tokenized-stock-trend-with-new-trading-feature/

data.title: Chainlink Whales Stack 85M LINK Amid Retail Cooling, Will Price Catch Up?
data.description:
Chainlink whales currently possess 85 million LINK tokens due to weak retail demand. Exchange outflows are 100,000 LINK per week on average, indicating steady institutional demand. Despite significant buildups, LINK price action continues to stay in the $12-$15 ranges. Technicians closely monitor significant resistance levels for breakouts to higher price levels
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/04/chainlink-whales-stack-85m-link-amid-retail-cooling-will-price-catch-up/

source: https://u.today/bitcoin-skyrockets-23575-in-one-hour-in-abnormal-liquidation-imbalance

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,500 USDT with a 3.05% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 04, 2025, 15:39 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,500 USDT and is now trading at 2,499.77002 USDT, with a narrowed 3.05% decrease in 24 hours.
